proof: function[T0: MetricSpace](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { T0.distance(x0, x1) <= T0.distance(x0, x2) + T0.distance(x2, x1) }[M](y, y, x)
function[T0: MetricSpace](x0: T0, x1: T0) { T0.distance(x0, x1) = T0.distance(x1, x0) }[M](y, x)
function[T0: MetricSpace](x0: T0) { 0 = T0.distance(x0, x0) }[M](y)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { not x0.is_negative or not x1.is_negative or (x0 + x1).is_negative }(x.distance(y), x.distance(y))
function(x0: Real) { not 0 <= x0 or not x0.is_negative }(x.distance(y) + x.distance(y))
function[T0: MetricSpace](x0: T0) { 0 = x0.distance(x0) }[M](x)
function[T0: MetricSpace](x0: T0) { 0 = x0.distance(x0) }[M](x)
x.distance(x) = 0
x.distance(x) != 0
function[T0: MetricSpace](x0: T0, x1: T0) { 0 != x0.distance(x1) or x0 = x1 }[M](x, y)
function[T0: MetricSpace](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 != x1 or 0 = x0.distance(x1) }[M](x, y)
x.distance(y) = 0 or y = x
y = x
x.distance(y) = 0
x.distance(y) != 0
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 != x1 or 0 = discrete[T0](x0, x1) }[T](x, y)
function(x0: Real) { x0 + -x0 <= 0 }(Real.one_half)
function(x0: Real) { x0 + -x0 = 0 }(Real.one_half)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { 1 = discrete[T0](x0, x1) or x0 = x1 }[T](x, y)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not T0.lt(x0, x1) or T0.lte(x0, x1) }[Real](0, 1)
function[T0: lib(ordered_field).OrderedField] { T0.0 < T0.1 }[Real]
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 != x1 or 0 = discrete[T0](x0, x1) }[T](x, x)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { 1 = discrete[T0](x0, x1) or x0 = x1 }[T](x, y)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { (if x0 = x1 { 0 } else { 1 }) = discrete[T0](x0, x1) }[T](x, y)
(if x = y { 0 } else { 1 }) != 1
y = x
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { 1 = discrete[T0](x0, x1) or x0 = x1 }[T](x, y)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { 1 = discrete[T0](x0, x1) or x0 = x1 }[T](y, x)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { 0 <= discrete[T0](x0, x1) }[T](y, z)

goal: discrete(x, z) <= discrete(x, y) + discrete(y, z)
proof: function[T0: lib(add_ordered_group).AddOrderedGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0) { not T0.lte(x0, x1) or not T0.lte(x2, x3) or T0.add(x0, x2) <= T0.add(x1, x3) }[Real](0, discrete(x, y), discrete(x, z), discrete(y, z))
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { 0 <= discrete[T0](x0, x1) }[T](x, y)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 != x1 or 0 = discrete[T0](x0, x1) }[T](x, z)
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[Real](discrete(x, z))

goal: discrete(x, z) <= discrete(x, y) + discrete(y, z)
proof: function[T0: lib(add_ordered_group).AddLeftOrderedGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not T0.lte(x0, x1) or T0.add(x2, x0) <= T0.add(x2, x1) }[Real](0, discrete(y, z), 1)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { 1 = discrete[T0](x0, x1) or x0 = x1 }[T](x, y)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { 1 = discrete[T0](x0, x1) or x0 = x1 }[T](x, z)
function(x0: Real) { x0 + 0 = x0 }(1)
not discrete(x, z) <= discrete(x, x) + discrete(y, z)
function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { T0.lte(x0, x1) or T0.lte(x1, x0) }[Real](discrete(y, z), discrete(y, z))
function[T0](x0: T0) { 0 = discrete[T0](x0, x0) }[T](x)
function(x0: Real) { 0 + x0 = x0 }(discrete(y, z))

goal: forall(x0: Color, x1: Color) { discrete(x0)(x1) = 0 implies x0 = x1 }
proof: exists(k0: Color, k1: Color) { discrete(k0, k1) = lib(zero).Zero.0[Real] and k1 != k0 }
let w0: Color satisfy { exists(k2: Color) { discrete(w0, k2) = lib(zero).Zero.0[Real] and k2 != w0 } }
exists(k3: Color) { discrete(w0, k3) = lib(zero).Zero.0[Real] and k3 != w0 }
let w1: Color satisfy { discrete(w0, w1) = lib(zero).Zero.0[Real] and w1 != w0 }
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { lib(zero).Zero.0[Real] != discrete[T0](x0, x1) or x0 = x1 }[Color](w0, w1)
exists(k0: Color) { discrete(k0, k0) != lib(zero).Zero.0[Real] }
let w0: Color satisfy { discrete(w0, w0) != lib(zero).Zero.0[Real] }
function[T0](x0: T0) { lib(zero).Zero.0[Real] = discrete[T0](x0, x0) }[Color](w0)

goal: forall(x0: Color, x1: Color) { discrete(x0)(x1) = discrete(x1)(x0) }
proof: exists(k0: Color, k1: Color) { discrete(k1, k0) != discrete(k0, k1) }
let w0: Color satisfy { exists(k2: Color) { discrete(k2, w0) != discrete(w0, k2) } }
exists(k3: Color) { discrete(k3, w0) != discrete(w0, k3) }
let w1: Color satisfy { discrete(w1, w0) != discrete(w0, w1) }
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { (if x0 = x1 { lib(zero).Zero.0[Real] } else { lib(one).One.1[Real] }) = discrete[T0](x0, x1) }[Color](w0, w1)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { (if x0 = x1 { lib(zero).Zero.0[Real] } else { lib(one).One.1[Real] }) = discrete[T0](x0, x1) }[Color](w1, w0)

goal: forall(x0: Color, x1: Color, x2: Color) { discrete(x0)(x2) <= discrete(x0)(x1) + discrete(x1)(x2) }
proof: exists(k0: Color, k1: Color, k2: Color) { not lib(lte).LTE.lte[Real](discrete(k0, k2), lib(add).Add.add[Real](discrete(k0, k1), discrete(k1, k2))) }
let w0: Color satisfy { exists(k3: Color, k4: Color) { not lib(lte).LTE.lte[Real](discrete(w0, k4), lib(add).Add.add[Real](discrete(w0, k3), discrete(k3, k4))) } }
exists(k5: Color, k6: Color) { not lib(lte).LTE.lte[Real](discrete(w0, k6), lib(add).Add.add[Real](discrete(w0, k5), discrete(k5, k6))) }
let w1: Color satisfy { exists(k7: Color) { not lib(lte).LTE.lte[Real](discrete(w0, k7), lib(add).Add.add[Real](discrete(w0, w1), discrete(w1, k7))) } }
exists(k8: Color) { not lib(lte).LTE.lte[Real](discrete(w0, k8), lib(add).Add.add[Real](discrete(w0, w1), discrete(w1, k8))) }
let w31: Color satisfy { not lib(lte).LTE.lte[Real](discrete(w0, w31), lib(add).Add.add[Real](discrete(w0, w1), discrete(w1, w31))) }
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { lib(lte).LTE.lte[Real](discrete[T0](x0, x1), lib(add).Add.add[Real](discrete[T0](x0, x2), discrete[T0](x2, x1))) }[Color](w0, w31, w1)
